name: Unsplash API
description: Unsplash provides free, high-resolution stock photos contributed by a global community of photographers. Use the API to search for photos by keyword, retrieve photo details with download URLs, browse curated collections, and access user portfolios. All photos are free to use under the Unsplash License.

capabilities.name: search_photos
capabilities.description: Search for photos by keyword query. Returns paginated results with URLs for different image sizes (raw, full, regular, small, thumb). Supports filtering by orientation and dominant color.

capabilities.name: get_photo
capabilities.description: Retrieve full details for a specific photo by its ID, including EXIF data, location, download links at multiple resolutions, and photographer information.

capabilities.name: get_random_photo
capabilities.description: Get one or more random photos, optionally filtered by search query, collection, orientation, or topic. Useful for generating varied visual content.

capabilities.name: list_collections
capabilities.description: List featured photo collections curated by Unsplash editors. Each collection contains a set of thematically related photos.

capabilities.name: search_collections
capabilities.description: Search for photo collections by keyword query. Returns matching collections with their titles, descriptions, cover photos, and total photo counts.

capabilities.name: get_user_photos
capabilities.description: Retrieve photos uploaded by a specific Unsplash user, identified by username. Returns paginated results ordered by most recent.

capabilities.name: track_download
capabilities.description: Track a photo download event. Required by the Unsplash API Terms to be called when a photo is downloaded or used. Returns the actual download URL.
